symptoms: Brown to dark concentric spots on leaves
Potato___Early_blight.cause: Fungal infection often favored by warm and humid conditions.
remedy: Remove severely infected leaves if possible
Apply recommended fungicide as per local agricultural guidance
Avoid overhead irrigation when disease pressure is high
Potato___Early_blight.severity_note: If spread is rapid across the field, consult a local agriculture expert immediately.

symptoms: Rapid spread in cool and humid conditions
Potato___Late_blight.cause: Serious oomycete disease that spreads quickly under favorable moisture conditions.
remedy: Apply suitable fungicidal control under expert recommendation
Improve drainage and reduce leaf wetness
Potato___Late_blight.severity_note: This disease can spread quickly and may require urgent field action.

symptoms: No major visible disease symptoms detected

remedy: Use recommended fungicidal treatment under local advisory
Tomato___Early_blight.severity_note: Monitor spread carefully, especially during humid periods.

symptoms: Severe infection under cool humid weather
Tomato___Late_blight.cause: Aggressive disease that spreads rapidly in favorable environmental conditions.
remedy: Use recommended protective treatment as advised locally
Tomato___Late_blight.severity_note: Fast-spreading disease; quick action is recommended.

symptoms: No major visible disease symptoms detected
